name: First of the Crusader Kings
short_description: Starting as a North Germanic of any kind, participate immediately as an attacker in the first Catholic crusade
starting_conditions: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture
hints: Simply start in 1066 and wait. The Pope should call the first Crusade around 1100, give or take.

name: Völva
short_description: Starting and staying as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, take the Found Witch Coven Decision
starting_conditions: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru
requirements: Has North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru Has taken the "Found Witch Coven" decision.
hints: In 867, replace the Chief of Gotland (island near Sweden) with a 34 year old custom ruler of Norse culture and Asatru faith with 6 children and the Diplomat and Witch traits. Immediately begin Convert to Witchcraft schemes on your children, ensuring that your heir is one of the children converted (this is required for the decision). Once three children have been converted, take the decision.

name: A Dangerous Business
short_description: As a dwarf, win a Varangian Adventurer War anywhere outside of Europe
requirements: Won a Varangian Adventurer Conquest war outside of Europe. Dwarf trait
hints: In 867 create a Norse culture character with the Dwarf trait. Win a war with the Varangian Adventure casus belli. A simple method is to have your custom character start as the Duke of Småland, then after some raiding and hunting to get sufficient troops and prestige, launch the Varangian Adventure on the nomadic duchy title of Karayedisan, which is outside Europe and within diplomatic range. Alternatively, create a Norse character with the Dwarf trait anywhere on the map and target the nearest valid character. You will have to make do with your own troops (no special soldiers) this way but there are plenty of weak rulers in 867 to do this with.

name: Saga in Stone
short_description: Have your Dynasty erect a hundred runestones
requirements: Has taken the "Raise Runestone" decision 100 times.
hints: The fastest method involves a game exploit. In 1066, replace the Seljuk Emperor with a custom ruler of Norse culture who is 46 years old, unmarried, and has one son. Put all points into Stewardship. On game start, assign good tax collectors and completely max out the Wealth tree in the Stewardship lifestyle focus. Wait ten years, making sure you build up to around 6000 gold, then wait for the Dissolution Faction to form. Surrender to them. Now as Persia, give away as many of your titles as you can, keeping one duchy title and at least three counties that are part of it. Surrender to the faction again when it pops. Now as a duke, land your son with one of the counties in your realm, and land a random noble with the other. Drive down the random vassal's opinion, then try and fail to imprison him. Surrender to the rebellion to be deposed. Choose to play as your son, then raise the runestone (gaining a rank from count to duke allows it to be raised), invite your father to court, land him, imprison the vassal, and repeat until the achievement pops. Don't spend unnecessary gold and keep your income low; the cost of runestones scales with income, with the minimum being 50. You will need at least 5000 gold to complete this. It is not recommended to try to achieve this via normal gameplay. The runestone decision has a 10 year cooldown except in cases of death or deposition. It will therefore take 1000 years to complete the achievement, which is not possible in normal gameplay. The achievement relies on extraordinary circumstances to fire naturally; using one of these exploits is the only reliable method.

name: Far From Home
short_description: Starting and staying as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, have your Realm Capital on any of the Islands in the Indian Ocean Region. May not be available for characters created in the Ruler Designer.
starting_conditions: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru Custom character
requirements: Has North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru Capital is on an island in the Indian Ocean: One of the following Duchies Within the Kingdom of Lanka: Dakhina Desa Ruhunu Sinhala Within the Kingdom of Yemen: Socotra One of the following Counties Within the Kingdom of Tamilakam: Maldives Within the Kingdom of Gujarat: Kutch
hints: If you have the Roads to Power DLC, in 867 start as Master Ubbe of the Scourge of the Saxons. As an adventurer, you can easily move your camp down the the island of Socotra off the coast of Yemen, stopping to gather Provisions along the way. Your camp is considered your Realm Capital, so as soon as you make camp on the island, you should get the achievement. Without the DLC, in 867 start as Jarl Hæsteinn of Montaigu. Start of by taking counties from the North Africans, Tulunids, the East Africans, and finally use the Varangian Adventure casus belli on the island of Socotra.

name: Vladimir's Second Choice
short_description: Starting as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, convert to any Islamic Faith & convert all of the Russian Region to any Islamic Faith
starting_conditions: North Germanic heritage or Norman or Russian culture Asatru
requirements: Has North Germanic heritage or Norman or Russian culture Muslim religion All counties in the Russian Region have Muslim religion
hints: Play the The Great Adventurers scenario as Rurik Rurikid of Novgorod. He starts with the land and gold required to create the Kingdom of Novgorod. Consider lowering the frequency of Scandinavian Adventurers in game rules if converting to Islam while still weak. Fast conversion is possible through the Evangelize to the Realm decision unlocked after completing an Illustrious or better Holy Legend. NOTE: The Russian Region required for this achievement requires the de jure Empire of Russia AND the de jure Kingdom of Galicia-Volhynia

name: Canute the Greater
short_description: As an unreformed Tribal, take the Secure the High Kingdom of the North Sea Decision
requirements: Government is Tribal Religion is Unreformed Has taken the "Secure the High Kingdom of the North Sea" decision
hints: Any of the tribal sons of Ragnar (Ivar the Boneless, Sigurdr Snake in the Eye, or Bjorn Ironside) can quickly snowball and conquer all the required territory in one or two lifetimes. However, the decision requires holding the three kingdom titles (England, Denmark, and Norway) for 30 years within one ruler's lifetime. Use Scandinavian Elective succession to choose a young heir and Learning lifestyle's health increasing perks to ensure your ruler lives long enough to meet the condition.

name: Faster than the Fox
short_description: Starting and staying as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, Completely Control the Kingdom of Sicily before 1047. May not be available for characters created in the Ruler Designer.
starting_conditions: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru Custom character
requirements: Has North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru Completely controls the Kingdom of Sicily Is Independent Date is before 1047.1.1
hints: Although the steam achievement states Norse tribal, the in-game achievement has been changed to allow any government type, including Jarl Haesteinn who is now feudal. This will still trigger the steam achievement. Starting as Jarl Haesteinn in 867 use the Duchy conquest casus belli to seize Sicily while they are at war with the Byzantines. Move your capital to Palermo and start conquering small independent Counts and Dukes. For Byzantine territories, wait for a weakness or make allies to match their strength and use the Kingdom conquest casus belli to take all of the land in one war, since it could be a costly war keep it for the end. Alternatively, after taking enough non-Byzantine and Italian land to create the Kingdom, swear fealty to the Byzantines and the emperor should grant you the remaining de-jure counties in the Kingdom of Sicily. Follow this with an independence war when having a stronge enough faction or enough allies. Another approach (if the Roads to Power DLC is NOT installed, which keeps the Byzantines Feudal) would be to swear fealty to the Byzantine Emperor after you have seized Sicily, start by conquering the smaller independent realms and vassals of the Byzantine empire. You should modify your feudal contract to protect yourself from title revocation, you can always add religious rights to your contract later. You will then have to break away from the empire eventually and can do this via an independence faction, use your spy master to find hooks on the various dukes in the empire so you can force them to join. A few assassinations can also destabilize the empire. Once you are independent the achievement should fire.

name: Miklagarðaríki
short_description: Starting and staying as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, Completely Control the Kingdom of Thessalonika & hold any Empire without holding Byzantine Empire. May not be available for characters created in the Ruler Designer.
starting_conditions: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru Custom character
requirements: Has North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru Completely controls the Kingdom of Thessalonika Empire title Byzantine Empire
hints: Starting as Count Hæsteinn of Montaigu in 867, declare a conquest war on Count Gregorios of Napoli to reach the Diplomatic Range needed to declare on The Byzantine Empire. Hire mercenaries to fight for you to not waste your special soldiers, hire one company for the county war and save your money for later. If you capture any important couriers, make sure to ransom them for some extra money, which means extra soldiers. When you are ready, declare war on The Byzantine Empire with the Invade Kingdom casus belli and select Thessalonika. Preferably wait until The Byzantine Emprie is at war or deals with rebellions. Priortize sieging down counties close to the objective and preferably inside the objective. Eventually you will have to face the armies of The Byzantine Empire, defending will most times just about make you win, but getting them to cross a strait (for example between Kalliopolis and Lampsakos) will greatly increase your chances of winning. If you reset your perks at the start, you can chose to go the Gallant path. This will help with overal combat and decrese the war-score needed to win the war. You can now go on and create any empire you want. The Empire of Ajuraan only needs 18 counties and you can reach High Chiefdom of Naqis to not deal with The Tulunid Sultanate and The Abbasid Empire. Accept any Peasent Rabble's as it is way less trouble to have the lowered controll than dealing with the rebels, as you won't gain a lot of money from tax. Allying some big kingdoms with lots of men will help discourage The Byzantine Empire to retake provinces. Fortunately, most times they will implode.

name: King of all the Isles
short_description: Starting and staying as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, Completely Control everything in the Islands in the Atlantic and Mediterranean Region without ever having over 80 Realm Size
starting_conditions: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture Asatru
requirements: Is North Germanic culture group or Norman Asatru Realm Size above 80 provinces Completely controls the following: The following Duchies: Within the Kingdom of Norway:f Iceland Northern Isles Within the Kingdom of Denmark: Sjælland Within the Kingdom of Sweden: Visby Within the Kingdom of Scotland: the Isles Mann Within the Kingdom of Maghreb: Canarias Within the Kingdom of Valencia: Mallorca Within the Kingdom of Sardinia: Sardinia Corsica Within the Kingdom of Sicily: Sicily Within the Kingdom of Venice: Venice Within the Kingdom of Epirus: Cephalonia Within the Kingdom of Krete: Krete Within the Kingdom of Cyprus: Cyprus The following Counties: Within the Kingdom of Denmark: Bornholm Within the Kingdom of Sweden: Aland Öland Within the Kingdom of Estonia: Osel Within the Kingdom of Wales: Anglesey Within the Kingdom of England: Wight Within the Kingdom of Thessalonika: Chios Lesbos Naxos Rhodos
hints: The most powerful island holder is the Byzantine Empire. Try starting as Jarl Haesteinn in 867 and take a part of Sardinia to get in range of them. Then immediately invade Thessalonika with mercenaries to capture both the islands in it and to take Constantinople away from them to weaken them for future wars. Form or usurp a duchy, but don't form the kingdom of Thessalonika yet as having a kingdom will block the Elevate the Kingdom of Mann & the Isles decision. Conquer weaker islands to build Haesteinn's fame to that of a Living Legend. Wait for Ivar the Boneless or his event spawn troops to die and take the Isle of Mann. Then use Elevate the Kingdom of Mann & the Isles decision to get a kingdom title and more event spawn troops. Use these troops to battle the powerful Karlings, Wessex, Arabs, and the Byzantines for the rest of the islands. In version 1.3.1 you can go over 80 realm size, for the achievement to unlock you will have to go under the 80 realm size and reload the save file. This is due to the game only checking if it is possible at the start of the game and does not (yet) add any flags to the game to fully disable it. After getting this achievement consider doing the Miklagarðaríki achievement in the same playthrough : the empire of Italia only needs 42 counties (you already have Corsica and Sardinia) and if the kingdom of Italy exists you can annex it in one war.
